# Language

**Data field**

A 16-bit integer holding a packed ISO 639-2/T code.

## Overview

Language codes are described in User Data Text Strings and Language Codes in [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/QuickTime-File-Format/User_data_atoms].

## Data fields

- **Reserved**: A 32-bit integer.
- **Name**: A string holding the track name.

items.description: A string holding the track name.
items.name: Name
